title: Mathieu Pagé
text: Home * People * Mathieu Pagé Mathieu Pagé , a Canadian software devloper in the insurance induytry and as avocational computer chess programmer author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol compliant chess engine MatMoi [1] , under development approximately since 2003. MatMoi 7.15.0, which played the CCT12 , was published as free engine in March 2010 [2] .
